creator: cpm@freebsd.org
text:
Iridium can be updated to 2017.11 (based on the Chromium version 62.0.3202.94), but I will need some time to update the port or more manpower to achieve this goal before.

Anyway I just realized that the Iridium developers are working on 65.x release

http://lists.inai.de/pipermail/iridium/2018-April/000725.html
